COMMON: [gold][font_size=28][b]Common:[/b][/font_size][/gold] Weak relics that are commonly found.
EVENT: [gold][font_size=28][b]Event:[/b][/font_size][/gold] Relics which are only obtained through events.
RARE: [gold][font_size=28][b]Rare:[/b][/font_size][/gold] Unique and powerful relics which are seldom seen.
SHOP: [gold][font_size=28][b]Shop:[/b][/font_size][/gold] Relics which can only be purchased from the Merchant.
STARTER: [gold][font_size=28][b]Starter:[/b][/font_size][/gold] Characters begin their run with these relics.
UNCOMMON: [gold][font_size=28][b]Uncommon:[/b][/font_size][/gold] Stronger relics which appear less often than common relics.
